notes: PRs #1420,#1426,#1439,#1442,#1450,#1451,#1452,#1454,#1456,#1457,#1463 MERGED. PRs #1429,#1438 CLOSED. #1406 CLOSED. Monthly #1403 closed, April 2026 monthly #1433 active. PR #1431=CMI p-value fix. PR #1432=Delta method CI (closes #336). PR #1435=EconML categorical EM fix. PR #1455=fix KeyError conditional_MI. PR #1460=fix categorical groupby KeyError + FutureWarning in dummy_outcome_refuter (closes #1316). PR #1461=fix estimate_effect_naive list-form treatment_variable (closes #416). PR #1462=fix TwoStageRegression preinstantiated second_stage_model (closes #1335). PR #1464=feat auto-select default method_name in estimate_effect (closes #365). PR #1465=fix exact_match_cols bugs in DistanceMatchingEstimator + 12 new tests (closes #814). PR #1466=test increase sample size in linear classification auto test (fixes flaky test in test_auto.py). PR #1467=fix multi-treatment PlaceboTreatmentRefuter (closes #251). PR #1468=test add initial test coverage for gcm.fitting_sampling (13 tests). fix-1019=fix LinearRegressionEstimator pvalue returns scalar not array (closes #1019) - PR pending. #1444 can be closed (absorbed into #1432). #1443 is ISSUE (CI workflow file protected). #1458 is ISSUE (now resolved - Dependabot PRs #1450, #1451 merged). #1459 is human-contributed PR fixing Repo Assist #1427 (closes #1427). Commented #927 (DML model setup for multiclass). Commented #1019 (traced root cause p-value array bug).

fix_attempts.description: Fix LinearRegressionEstimator._test_significance to return scalar float for single treatment
Fix PlaceboTreatmentRefuter to support multiple treatments (permute and random data)
Fix 3 bugs in DistanceMatchingEstimator.estimate_effect with exact_match_cols; add 12 tests
Auto-select default estimation method when method_name=None
